title: Create Ultra Light
description: Ultra Light Modpack Designed around create, fabric, and aternos servers.
body: This Ultra Light Modpack is designed for Aternos servers and includes only 4 serverside mods: Create Fabric, Create: Steam n' Rails, Create: Central Kitchen, and Farmer's Delight. This modpack aimed to make it easy to download onto an Aternos server manually. It stands out as the best in its class because it is easy to install mod by mod onto a server, has a small number of mods, and includes the Create and Farmer's Delight mods. modpack is the best in its class because it is easy to install mod by mod onto a server, light in mods, and contains create and farmer's delight.
